source.title: ИИ - ТВОЙ ДРУГ, а НЕ ВРАГ! И ВОТ ПОЧЕМУ 😳 Дима Мацкевич про эволюцию человека и ИИ

chapters.title: Watch this episode!
We show you Dima's luxurious villa right away!
Which profession will be the first to die? Expectedly.
This AI mattress can do such things?! WHAT?
Does Dima's partner think he's a freak?
All the "remote workers" will go to work in a factory!
For some reason, Ilya suddenly ended up in the USA...
Is Dima autistic?
Dima received a grant from Durov! HOW?
A fact about Durov that no one knows?
AI can already do THIS!
Dima didn't care when his friend was a f**ker?
How does a day go for someone like that?
Dima goes to the gym with a laptop! WHY?
How did Dima get a talent visa to the US?
The best advice for those who are AI NOOBS!
Lifehacks: How to and what not to do with AI
The best advice for easily using AI
A very unusual solution from Dima and his friends during Covid
Why are Ilya's videos so rare? We answer!
Dima is ALREADY building projects of the future!
Why does Dima live in Bali when he could live in the US?!
We've arrived in the city of the future - Nuanu
Why is Bali great for kids?
Don't have money? Here's what to do!
What to do if you're afraid of AI?! There's an answer.
Just look at this sunset!
A SIMPLY UNREAL PRIZE DRAW FOR YOU!
